subcodes.first_line: O ye two daughters of the Kingdom! Your letter has been received. Praise be unto God, it conveyed the glad-tiding of the attachment of hearts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنت ملکوت نامه شما رسید الحمد لله بشارت تعلق قلوب بملکوت الله داشت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @education of children; moral education
